basic_details.job_title: ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: EX-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has released the official Medical Officer Notification 2026 at https://echs.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with the prescribed minimum qualification and experience mentioned in the official notification can submit their offline applications until 07 July 2026. The age limit has not been specified in the official notification. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ECHS Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment is 07 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Medical Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 95,000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Medical Officer post in the EX- Servicemen Contributary Health Scheme (ECHS) recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Officer position will be based on an interview. Candidates shortlisted after the initial application review will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is www.echs.gov.in. Links are also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is 07 July 2026, and the interview is scheduled for the 3rd week of July 2026, specifically on 21 July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The Medical Officer position is a contractual job. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions specified by ECHS.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification and experience required for the Medical Officer post is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for specific educational and experience criteria.
